overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking along a sunlit waterfront dock in a fictional coastal city with European architecture. The player character moves past stone buildings, industrial machinery, and NPCs before ascending stairs and approaching a massive dead whale carcass infested with parasites, showcasing detailed game engine graphics with a distinctive steampunk-inspired aesthetic.

The camera moves forward past two NPCs standing by the railing, with distant wind turbines and mountains visible across the water.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and ascends a stone staircase through a covered archway, transitioning from the lower dock to an upper level. A large propaganda poster covers the right wall while a person sits in a small boat moored nearby.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway onto an upper dock platform, the camera reveals a massive dead whale carcass tied to the dock, its mouth agape showing rows of teeth and infested with red parasite nests. The area features wooden platforms and a tall brick building stands to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene, sunlit waterfront promenade toward a gruesome industrial discovery on an upper dock. It begins by gliding past a historic stone building with a tree growing from its facade and NPCs leaning against a railing, with distant wind turbines and mountains framing the horizon. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts to an open wooden dock characterized by industrial machinery and pools of red liquid staining the planks. The perspective then ascends a stone staircase through a covered archway, passing a large propaganda poster before emerging onto an elevated platform. Finally, the view opens to reveal a massive dead whale carcass tied to the dock, its agape mouth infested with red parasite nests beside a tall brick building.
